ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of the component (e.g., microcontroller, sensor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the component */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the component */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number of the component */,
  "datasheet_url" TEXT /* URL to the datasheet of the component */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the component record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the component record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pins" (
  "pin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pin */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the pin belongs to */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the pin */,
  "pin" TEXT /* Pin number */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the pin (e.g., input, output) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the pin */,
  "voltage_range" TEXT /* Voltage range the pin can handle */,
  "current_rating" TEXT /* Current rating of the pin */,
  "impedance" TEXT /* Impedance of the pin */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pin record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pin record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pins_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the package belongs to */,
  "package_type" TEXT /* Type of the package (e.g., TSSOP, HVQFN) */,
  "pin_count" INTEGER /* Number of pins in the package */,
  "package_size" TEXT /* Physical size of the package */,
  "pin_pitch" TEXT /* Distance between pins */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the package record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the package record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packages_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the revision belongs to */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date the revision was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the revision */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the revision */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who made the revision */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the revision was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, designer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
